name: Wolf Spider
description: One of Brookhollow Park's most dangerous non-boss threats. It hunts secluded ground, moves with stealth, and turns almost any mistake into brutal damage, venom, and panic.
behavior: It does not physically spawn during the first three in-game days. After that, it patrols at dusk, at night, and at dawn while sleeping through most of the day with a very recognizable snore. Once it starts hunting, it can drift toward your position even before true line of sight is established.
interactionWithPlayer: It turns hostile as soon as it senses you and can also drift toward you passively if you stay inside its territory. It steals Stinkbug Parts from player storage, and Spider Bait is one of the few clean ways to distract it.
interactionWithCreatures: It is passive toward all spider-type enemies and will never attack them. Against most other creatures it remains neutral unless something hits it or pushes too deeply into its path.
strategy: You want solid gear, but above all you need consistent perfect blocks. The long combo and the riposte are the deadliest parts of its kit. Spicy damage is still excellent, but you must watch your sizzle because its response can trigger off almost any lingering damage source.

combatStats.attackDamageSummary: Bite: 65. Charged Bite: 80. Jump Attack: 95. Riposte: 65.

inflicts: All of its attacks apply venom, and the heavier moves punish missed blocks with extremely dangerous buildup.

abilities.name: Bite
abilities.description: A basic but very damaging bite.

abilities.name: 5-Combo Bite
abilities.description: It chains together a long string of rapid bites. Each hit adds 20 venom buildup.

abilities.name: Charged Bite
abilities.description: It snarls, leans back, and lunges with a strong hit that breaks guard unless you perfect block it.

abilities.name: Jump Attack
abilities.description: It leaps into the air and lands on the player. Even on block, it still staggers the target.

abilities.name: Riposte
abilities.description: It raises into a defensive stance and, if it takes any damage, answers with an instant bite that staggers and drags the player closer.
